info.title: Ecomapp Main-buildTime
info.description: Ecomapp is a comprehensive e-commerce platform API that enables seamless online shopping experiences, product management, and order processing.

tags.name: products
tags.description: Operations related to product management such as creating, updating, retrieving, and deleting products.

tags.name: orders
tags.description: Endpoints for order processing, including creating orders, retrieving order details, and managing order status.

tags.name: users
tags.description: User management functionalities, including registration, authentication, and profile management.

get.summary: Retrieve the shopping cart for a specific user
get.description: Fetches the current shopping cart associated with the given userId. Returns the cart contents including items, quantities, and pricing details if available.

200.description: Successful retrieval of the user's cart.

400.description: Bad request due to invalid userId parameter.

example.message: The provided userId is invalid or malformed.

details.issue: Value is missing or not a valid string

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.summary: Add an item to the user's shopping cart
post.description: Adds a product item to the shopping cart for the specified userId. The request body must contain the item details including product ID, quantity, and options. Responds with the updated cart.

requestBody.description: Details of the item to add to the cart

200.description: Item successfully added to cart; returns updated cart.

example.message: One or more fields in the cart item are missing or invalid.

details.issue: Quantity must be a positive integer

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.summary: Place an order for the specified user
post.description: Processes the placement of an order for the user identified by userId. This operation creates a new order record based on the user's cart or provided order details and returns the order confirmation.

200.description: Order placed successfully, with order details returned.

400.description: Bad request due to invalid order placement parameters.

example.message: Order request failed validation due to invalid or missing fields.

details.issue: User ID must be provided and valid

404.description: User or cart not found for order placement.

example.message: The specified user or their shopping cart could not be found.

details.issue: No active cart or user record found

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

get.summary: Retrieve details of a specific order
get.description: Fetches detailed information about an order identified by orderId including item details, status, and shipping information.

example.message: The provided orderId is invalid or malformed.

details.issue: Must be a valid non-empty string

404.description: Order not found for the provided orderId.

example.message: No order exists with the specified orderId.

details.issue: Order does not exist in database

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.description: Starts a payment process with the provided payment request details. Returns payment authorization and processing details upon success.

example.message: The payment request contains invalid or missing fields.

details.issue: CVV must be a 3- or 4-digit string

402.description: Payment required and could not be processed.

example.message: The payment could not be authorized or was declined.
An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.description: Handle incoming webhook notifications related to payment events. The request body contains the payment event details, and the response acknowledges successful processing.

requestBody.description: Payload containing payment event data from the payment gateway

example.message: The webhook payload is invalid or malformed.
The payment could not be processed.

500.description: Internal Server Error - an unexpected error occurred

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.description: Add a new product to the catalog by providing product details in the request body. Returns the created product information upon success.

requestBody.description: New product details to add to the catalog

example.name: Wireless Mouse
example.description: Ergonomic wireless mouse with adjustable DPI

example.message: The provided product information is invalid.
A product with the same SKU already exists.

500.description: Internal Server Error - an unexpected error occurred

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

get.summary: Track shipment status for a specific order
get.description: Retrieve tracking information for the shipment associated with the specified order ID. Returns current status and location of the shipment.

404.description: Not Found - tracking information not found

example.message: No tracking information found for the provided order ID.

details.issue: Order ID does not match any shipment

500.description: Internal Server Error - an unexpected error occurred

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.description: Create a new user account by submitting user details in the request body. Returns user profile information upon successful registration.

requestBody.description: User registration information including personal and login details

example.message: Submitted user information contains errors.
A user with this email or username already exists.

500.description: Internal Server Error - an unexpected error occurred

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

currency.description: Currency code of the item's price, in ISO 4217 format.

discount.description: Discount applied to this cart item.

finalPrice.description: Final price of the item after applying discounts.

price.description: Original price of a single item before any discount.

quantity.description: Number of units of the product in the cart.

currency.description: Currency code used for the cart prices, in ISO 4217 format.

items.description: List of items currently in the cart.

totalAmount.description: Total amount before applying any discounts.

totalDiscount.description: Total discount applied on the entire cart.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the cart was last updated.

userId.description: Identifier of the user owning the cart.

discount.description: Discount applied to this order item.

finalPrice.description: Final price of the item after discount.

price.description: Original unit price of the product.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the order was created.

currency.description: Currency code used for order transactions, in ISO 4217 format.

paymentStatus.description: Status of the payment for this order.

totalDiscount.description: Total discount applied on the order.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the order was last updated.

userId.description: Identifier of the user who placed the order.

amount.description: The total amount to be paid in the specified currency

currency.description: The currency code in which the payment is made, in ISO 4217 format

orderId.description: A unique identifier for the order related to this payment

paymentGateway.description: The name of the payment gateway processing this request

paymentMethod.description: The method used for payment such as credit card, PayPal, etc.

amount.description: The total amount charged in the payment

createdAt.description: The ISO 8601 timestamp indicating when the payment was created

currency.description: The currency code used in the payment, in ISO 4217 format

orderId.description: The unique identifier for the order related to this payment

paymentId.description: The unique identifier assigned to the payment transaction

paymentMethod.description: The method used to complete the payment, e.g. credit card, PayPal

status.description: The current status of the payment, e.g. succeeded, failed, pending

transactionId.description: Identifier for the specific transaction within the payment gateway

gatewayResponse.description: Raw response message from the payment gateway regarding the payment

paymentId.description: The unique identifier for the payment related to this webhook event

status.description: The updated status of the payment from the webhook event

transactionId.description: The transaction ID from the payment gateway associated with this webhook

available.description: Indicates if the product is currently available for purchase

brand.description: The brand or manufacturer of the product

category.description: The category or type to which the product belongs

currency.description: The currency code in which the product price is specified, ISO 4217 format

description.description: A detailed description of the product's features and specifications
description.example: High-performance wireless headphones with noise cancellation

price.description: The retail price of the product in the specified currency

rating.description: Average customer rating score for the product

stock.description: The number of units available in stock

available.description: Indicates whether the product is currently available for purchase.

brand.description: The brand name of the product.

category.description: The category to which the product belongs.

createdAt.description: The ISO 8601 date and time when the product was created in the system.

currency.description: The currency code for the product price, following ISO 4217 format.

description.description: A detailed description of the product.
description.example: A 4K Ultra HD smart TV with HDR support.

price.description: The retail price of the product.

productId.description: A unique identifier for the product.

rating.description: Average customer rating for the product, on a scale from 1 to 5.

stock.description: Number of units currently available in stock.

updatedAt.description: The ISO 8601 date and time when the product details were last updated.

courierPartner.description: The name of the courier partner handling the delivery.

estimatedDelivery.description: The estimated date of delivery in ISO 8601 format.

lastUpdated.description: The date and time when the tracking information was last updated.

orderId.description: The unique identifier of the order being tracked.

status.description: The current status of the delivery.

trackingId.description: The tracking number assigned by the courier.

active.description: Indicates if the user account is active.

country.description: The country of the user's residence, specified as an ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 code.

name.description: The full name of the user.

phone.description: The phone number of the user in E.164 format.

preferredCurrency.description: The preferred currency code for transactions, following ISO 4217.

userType.description: The type or role of the user within the system.

active.description: Indicates whether the user account is active.

country.description: The country of residence of the user, as an ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 code.

createdAt.description: The ISO 8601 date and time when the user account was created.

name.description: The full name of the user.

phone.description: The user's phone number in E.164 format.

preferredCurrency.description: The user's preferred currency for transactions (ISO 4217 format).

updatedAt.description: The ISO 8601 date and time when the user profile was last updated.

userId.description: A unique identifier assigned to the user.

userType.description: Defines the role or classification of the user.

timestamp.description: Time the error occurred in ISO 8601 format

path.description: Request path that caused the error

errorCode.description: Specific error code identifying the error type

issue.description: Description of the issue with the field

timestamp.description: Time the error occurred in ISO 8601 format
